description: The gate's OCR camera system fails. The clerk must process a truck's entry manually.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the system failure and switch to manual processing mode.

expected_outcome.expected: Clerk is aware of the failure and prepared to handle manual entry.

nodes.task_description: Ask the driver for the container number and truck license plate and manually enter them into the system.

expected_outcome.expected: The clerk accurately types the required information into the gate system.

nodes.task_description: Perform all standard checks (appointment, customs) and issue the ticket.

expected_outcome.expected: Despite the system failure, the truck is processed correctly and allowed to enter.
